raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against Citibank for their refusal to investigate unauthorized recurring charges from a merchant named " XXXX. '' For over 20 months, from at least XX/XX/XXXX to the present, a charge appeared on my credit card statement every month from " XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. '' The monthly amount was {$10.00} from XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX, and then increased to {$11.00} from XX/XX/XXXX onward. I have never used or signed up for this service. 

I first attempted to resolve this with the merchant directly, but they were only willing to issue a partial refund for up to XXXX months, citing a company policy. I then sent a formal dispute letter to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX. 

Citibank responded with a letter stating they could not assist with charges older than XXXX months. This is in direct conflict with my rights as a consumer under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) regarding unauthorized charges.

I am requesting that Citibank fulfill their obligation to investigate all unauthorized charges and issue a full chargeback for the entire period of the fraudulent activity.
